name: MCP Router Bridge
description: Adds /search/smart, /templates/execute, and GET /open/<path> REST routes to the Local REST API plugin. Delegates semantic search to Smart Connections, template execution to Templater, and exposes a loopback-only no-auth navigation endpoint for clickable http links in chat/terminal contexts. Companion plugin for the multi-vault MCP router. No native binary, no telemetry.
author: tboome33
